creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
>But that command dumps core on FreeBSD's port.
>After core dump. Packed file that contains only the first to pack  remains.

  This problem was discussed in FreeBSD-users-jp Mailing List. Some
article is :

http://www.jp.freebsd.org/~yuki/FreeBSD/readmail.cgi?source=users-jp&docnum=5354
http://www.jp.freebsd.org/~yuki/FreeBSD/readmail.cgi?source=users-jp&docnum=5401

  But no one fix this problem......

  I think:

  One solution is that ja-mh would use new japaneized MH patch(*1):

ftp://ftp.tut.ac.jp:/Linux/JE-0.9.8a/sources/net/mh-6.8.3+-jp2c+-1.02.patch.gz

  The other is to merge a patch from MH-6.4.3(mail/mh).

--
Yoshiro MIHIRA
